requirement_topic.en: CREE / ENEE Grid Connection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz and Site Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: CREE / ENEE并网接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及现场协调
requirement_topic.zht: CREE / ENEE併網接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及現場協調

summary.en: Honduras is an Americas-style 60 Hz market. Low-voltage premises commonly use 120 V single-phase service with 240 V split-phase or higher-capacity service for larger loads, while commercial EV charging projects require utility-side capacity review, metering, protection, load calculation, and interconnection coordination with ENEE or the relevant distribution operator under the electricity-sector framework regulated by CREE. Honduras is also connected to the Central American regional electricity system, so large sites may face grid-capacity and power-quality constraints in addition to ordinary installation rules.
summary.zh: 洪都拉斯属于美洲体系60 Hz市场。低压场所通常采用120 V单相供电，并在较大负载下使用240 V分相或更高容量供电；商用电动汽车充电项目需在CREE监管的电力行业框架下，与ENEE或相关配电运营方完成供电容量审查、计量、保护、负荷计算和并网协调。洪都拉斯还接入中美洲区域电力系统，大型站点除普通安装规则外，可能还面临电网容量和电能质量约束。
summary.zht: 宏都拉斯屬於美洲體系60 Hz市場。低壓場所通常採用120 V單相供電，並在較大負載下使用240 V分相或更高容量供電；商用電動汽車充電項目需在CREE監管的電力行業框架下，與ENEE或相關配電運營方完成供電容量審查、計量、保護、負荷計算和併網協調。宏都拉斯還接入中美洲區域電力系統，大型站點除普通安裝規則外，可能還面臨電網容量和電能質量約束。

standards_or_laws: CREE electricity-sector laws, regulations, technical standards and procedures
ENEE utility interconnection and service-capacity coordination
Honduras low-voltage supply practice — 120/240 V, 60 Hz
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are generally engineered for 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz, with grid acceptance through the relevant China local grid operator. Product evidence often references GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, and GB/T 27930-2023 for DC communication. That 50 Hz China design baseline does not prove suitability for Honduras 60 Hz and 120/240 V service conditions.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常按220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz设计，并由中国当地电网运营商验收。产品证据常引用GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口及直流通信GB/T 27930-2023。该中国50 Hz设计基线不能证明产品适用于洪都拉斯60 Hz和120/240 V供电条件。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常按220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz設計，並由中國當地電網運營商驗收。產品證據常引用GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口及直流通訊GB/T 27930-2023。該中國50 Hz設計基線不能證明產品適用於宏都拉斯60 Hz和120/240 V供電條件。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger input stage, transformer, rectifier, metering, RCD/GFCI strategy, protective devices, labels, and thermal design are rated for 60 Hz and the site voltage actually supplied in Honduras. A commercial or DC charger should be quoted only after ENEE or the site utility confirms available capacity, service voltage, metering, protection, and commissioning documentation. China 220/380 V 50 Hz evidence alone is not Honduras grid-ready.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩输入级、变压器、整流器、计量、RCD/GFCI策略、保护器件、标签和热设计适用于60 Hz及洪都拉斯现场实际供电电压。商用或直流充电桩应在ENEE或现场公用事业单位确认可用容量、服务电压、计量、保护及调试文件后再报价。仅有中国220/380 V 50 Hz证据并不能证明满足洪都拉斯并网要求。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁輸入級、變壓器、整流器、計量、RCD/GFCI策略、保護器件、標籤和熱設計適用於60 Hz及宏都拉斯現場實際供電電壓。商用或直流充電樁應在ENEE或現場公用事業單位確認可用容量、服務電壓、計量、保護及調試文件後再報價。僅有中國220/380 V 50 Hz證據並不能證明滿足宏都拉斯併網要求。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations — CREE regulates the electricity sector and ENEE or the relevant utility must coordinate service capacity, metering, protection, and interconnection; exact project route must be confirmed locally
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid operator acceptance applies domestically and is not a CREE or ENEE approval substitute; voltage and frequency ratings must be re-confirmed for Honduras

source.publisher: CREE — Comisión Reguladora de Energía Eléctrica

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Honduras-ready charger package needs 60 Hz / 120-240 V input confirmation, utility-capacity review, protection and metering documentation, and CREE / ENEE coordination. China 50 Hz domestic grid evidence is not enough.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向洪都拉斯的充电桩资料包需要确认60 Hz / 120-240 V输入、完成公用事业容量审查、提供保护和计量文件，并与CREE / ENEE协调。中国50 Hz国内并网证据并不足够。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向宏都拉斯的充電樁資料包需要確認60 Hz / 120-240 V輸入、完成公用事業容量審查、提供保護和計量文件，並與CREE / ENEE協調。中國50 Hz國內併網證據並不足夠。
